channel.title: FAWN Daily AI News
channel.description: Plain-English AI, markets, policy, and money news for students.

item.title: AI spending hits markets as oil and jobs data shape the rate debate
item.description: FAWN Daily AI News for July 23, 2026: AI capital spending rattles Alphabet and Tesla investors, oil above $100 adds inflation pressure, U.S. jobless claims fall sharply, Washington debates AI transparency, and OpenAI's reported Hugging Face incident raises safety questions.
